name: fde-consultant
description: Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) methodology + 7 MCP tools + DeepSCR Trust Score. Production-grade Skill that turns Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex CLI, and OpenClaw into a forward-deployed engineer.

skills.name: fde-consultant
skills.description: Core FDE methodology with 14 Operating Principles, 10 Anti-Patterns, 6-Q decomposition, and 5-stage loop (Stage 0 Reconnaissance -> Scoping -> Prototyping -> Production -> Feedback)

skills.name: modex-runtime
skills.description: Multi-agent runtime with 4 roles (Lead, Researcher, Builder, Certifier) and Trust Score gate

mcpServers.name: fde-consultant
mcpServers.description: FDE Consultant MCP server exposing 7 tools: fde_recon, fde_decompose, fde_roi, fde_scientific_search, fde_evals, fde_ontology, fde_trust_score

commands.name: fde-scope
commands.prompt: Read skill/SKILL.md and act as an FDE Consultant. Apply the 6-Q decomposition (process/decision/data/cost/current-state/success-metric) to the user's problem. Output a falsifiable claim + 6 answered questions.

commands.name: fde-evals
commands.prompt: Read skill/references/eval-rubric.md. Generate a 6-trait eval rubric for the user's deliverable, plus a golden set of 5 test cases.

commands.name: fde-certify
commands.description: Run the independent Certifier on the Skill
commands.prompt: Run `python3 -m modex.certify_skill --skill-path ./skill --output ./cert.json` and explain the result.
